summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI/UX refinement testing for 16 features. Fixed 1 bug (mobile header text truncation) - removed max-w-[146px] constraint from mobile brand name. All 16 features verified and passing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 UI/UX refinement features verified: (1) Hero logo 1.6s ease-out animation - PASS, (2) Letter-by-letter text 0.08s delay - PASS, (3) Mobile header text NOT truncated - PASS (fixed truncation by removing max-w-[146px]), (4) Mobile menu full screen center-aligned - PASS, (5) Catering static hero - PASS, (6) Portfolio detail pt-20 padding - PASS, (7) Portfolio 8-image 4-col grid - PASS, (8) Blog min-h-screen - PASS, (9) Editorial items-center - PASS, (10) Blog detail hero in container - PASS, (11) Blog detail content structure - PASS, (12) Blog CTA button only - PASS, (13) No rounded corners - PASS, (14) Enquiry larger card - PASS, (15) Enquiry field spacing - PASS, (16) Enquiry mobile bg switch - PASS.

features_tested.2_letter_by_letter_text: PASS - 21 letters with 0.08s delay per letter
features_tested.3_mobile_header_not_truncated: PASS - Fixed by removing max-w-[146px] truncate classes
features_tested.4_mobile_menu_fullscreen_centered: PASS - inset-0, height=100%, flex items-center justify-center
features_tested.11_blog_detail_content_structure: PASS - hero, title/meta, paragraph, large image, gallery, paragraph, gallery, CTA

fix_applied.reason: Mobile header brand name was being truncated due to max-w-[146px] constraint. Removed this to allow full text display.
